CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JACQUELINE WOODS AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 805 WEB- STER ST, APT. D, S.F, CA. - $1,071 RENT & DAMAGES - $110 COSTS - $250 ATTY FEES - WRIT FOR EVICTION MAY ISSUE UPON 24 HRS. NOTICE TO DEF. IF SHE FAILS TO KEEP AGREEMENT (DEF. TO PAY $439 BY 5PM, 3-28-94 BY CAHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER; PAY MONTHLY RENT ON TIME ON THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH PLUS AN ADDITIONAL $143 BEGINNING 4-5-94 UNTIL BAL. OF JUDGMENT IS PD. IN FULL) - FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKS, PATRICIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 805 WEBSTER ST, #D, SF, CA $1,431.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,431.00, LEASE FORFEITED
